item.title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
item.description:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Repair
(Utilities)
Website www.usbdriverepair.org provides recovery software to revive lost formatted media files from mass storage devices. Easy restore image tool regains all corrupted images, photos, pictures, audio, video, graphics, text, document and other media from hard disk drives in minimal time. Effective recovery card tool helps to regain formatted files and folders from removable media drives. Professional USB Drive Repair software scans entire disk drive to quickly locate and restore deleted media files from windows hard disk drives in effective manner. New highly improved image recovery program also facilitate user to preview their lost formatted files and folders before actual recovery of files. Reliable card restore tool allow users to recover their deleted files without acquiring technical skills. Proficient recovery tool has interactive user friendly interface for users to regain their corrupted files from compact flash drives. Best restore card software retrieves data lost due to virus attack from hard disk drives, mistakenly pressed deleted button from digital camera, windows hard disk failure, human error or any other logical error. New image retrieval tool is compatible with all windows operating system and also support all major file formats like .txt, .doc, .mpeg, .jpg, .wav, .bmp, .png and other file formats. Professional file restore utility supports all removable storage devices like portable hard disk drives, PDAs, smart card, multimedia drives, compact flash drives, PC card, SD card, MMC card and other USB enabled mass storage devices.USB recovery software easily restore all inaccessible files and folders from removable drives.*Reliable image recovery tool helps to restore all corrupted images and photos from picture card.*Advance card recovery program revives deleted files and folders from storage devices.*Innovative photo retrieval tool easily restores corrupted audio and video files from smart media.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Drive Repair
(Utilities)
Website www.usbdriverepair.org provides recovery software to revive lost formatted media files from mass storage devices. Easy restore image tool regains all corrupted images, photos, pictures, audio, video, graphics, text, document and other media from hard disk drives in minimal time. Effective recovery card tool helps to regain formatted files and folders from removable media drives. Professional USB Drive Repair software scans entire disk drive to quickly locate and restore deleted media files from windows hard disk drives in effective manner. New highly improved image recovery program also facilitate user to preview their lost formatted files and folders before actual recovery of files. Reliable card restore tool allow users to recover their deleted files without acquiring technical skills. Proficient recovery tool has interactive user friendly interface for users to regain their corrupted files from compact flash drives. Best restore card software retrieves data lost due to virus attack from hard disk drives, mistakenly pressed deleted button from digital camera, windows hard disk failure, human error or any other logical error. New image retrieval tool is compatible with all windows operating system and also support all major file formats like .txt, .doc, .mpeg, .jpg, .wav, .bmp, .png and other file formats. Professional file restore utility supports all removable storage devices like portable hard disk drives, PDAs, smart card, multimedia drives, compact flash drives, PC card, SD card, MMC card and other USB enabled mass storage devices.USB recovery software easily restore all inaccessible files and folders from removable drives.*Reliable image recovery tool helps to restore all corrupted images and photos from picture card.*Advance card recovery program revives deleted files and folders from storage devices.*Innovative photo retrieval tool easily restores corrupted audio and video files from smart media.

[read more]

Easy restore image tool regains all corrupted images, photos, pictures, audio, video, graphics, text, document and other media from hard disk drives in minimal time. item.title: USB Drive Data Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Data Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Data Repair Software
(Utilities)
Folder recalling application is loaded with advance options to search and restore wrongly formatted data from damaged jump drive to a specific place in user computer system. Revive whole lost files from logically corrupted pen drive by using USB drive data restoration application in just few minutes. Removable media data recovery software enables user to revive lost office documents like excel spreadsheets, presentations, word documents etc from flash drive quickly.

[read more]
item.description:

Removable media data recovery software enables user to revive lost office documents like excel spreadsheets, presentations, word documents etc from flash drive quickly.

Folder recalling application is loaded with advance options to search and restore wrongly formatted data from damaged jump drive to a specific place in user computer system. Removable media data recovery software enables user to revive lost office documents like excel spreadsheets, presentations, word documents etc from flash drive quickly.

item.title: Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Company offers Data Recovery PC software specially designed to restore your overall crashed, damaged files or folders information after accidental hard drive, USB partitioned and formatted in a few mouse clicks. Highly technical restore computer program easily or quickly install on your Pc in few mouse clicks and supports to recovers overall system files details with long file name save in html /text file format without any extra knowledge.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Android File Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Company proposed you to download Android File Recovery Program on your personal PC that is specialized program used to restore damaged documents, images, pictures, audio, video clips from mass storage drive in just limited time and effort. File retrieval utility generates preview and restore them at any safe PC location.

item.title: USB Drive Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Repair Software
(Utilities)
USB Drive Repair Software easily retrieves lost, corrupted and damaged files from removable media drives. www.usbdriverepair.org refers recovery software that is for reviving deleted songs, music files etc from flash drive. Restoration program undelete logically corrupted files from hard disk without any prior technical assistance.

USB Drive Repair Software easily retrieves lost, corrupted and damaged files from removable media drives. www.usbdriverepair.org refers recovery software that is for reviving deleted songs, music files etc from flash drive. Restoration program undelete logically corrupted files from hard disk without any prior technical assistance.

item.title: Flash Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Card Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Flash Card Data Recovery Software is available on website www.usbflashdriverecovery.org that is highly capable and provide user-friendly or GUI environment to use by user for recovering and storing lost, missing, deleted, corrupted data from different mini SD storage device. With digital data recovery program any technical as well as non technical person can easily operate and no technical knowledge or training is required to work on tool for regaining various important data from different type of removable storage device. Flash drive file reviving tool is used to retrieve deleted or missing media files in different format like bmp, jpg, tiff, gif audio-video files like mp3, wav, mpeg etc without any requirement of technical assistance. Advance file recovery program is specialized and professional utility which offers to user for retrieving and storing lost data from memory cards within short time duration.

[read more]
item.description:

item.title: bash-pac [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: bash-pac [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
bash-pac
(Arcade)
if you do not want to install the bash script click here https://onlinegdb.com/4wNEzIXxL
about the project
the bash-pac is clone of pacman that is writen in bash script.

if you want better expirience Install
pacman4console

Game Instructions
Player character: (C)

Avoid the ghost (G) while collecting food (.) to increase your score.

Controls:
A: Move Left, S Move Down, D Move Right, W move up

if you dont want opencode git here is github link
https://github.com/justmaxcz/bash-pac/tree/main
[read more]

item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge.
